title: cirsium angulosum
intro: Cirsium angulosum, also known as the prickly thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family, known for its distinctive spiny leaves and purple flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and ease digestive issues. The health benefits of Cirsium angulosum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Cirsium angulosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
